display.purpose: Page titles and modal headings only.

headline.purpose: Section headings, card titles, stat labels.

title.purpose: Subsection headers, dialog headings, sidebar brand mark.

body.purpose: All running text, descriptions, empty state copy. Cap at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Button text, nav labels, field labels, metadata.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Diffuse, full-surround grounding for card surfaces. Grounds without lifting.

shadows.name: button-glow
shadows.purpose: Tinted indigo glow under primary buttons at rest. Communicates pressability.

motion.name: press-scale
motion.purpose: Applied to all interactive surfaces via active:scale-95. Kinaesthetic press feedback.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default state change duration for hover, focus, and active states.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop sidebar visible; mobile bottom nav hides.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per screen. Gradient indigo to violet with tactile press spring.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 20px; height: 40px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.56 0.23 285), oklch(0.55 0.22 305)); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 20px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(0.56 0.23 285 / 0.30); transition: all 150ms; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.56 0.23 285); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. White background, Hairline border, Cloud hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 20px; height: 40px; background: oklch(0.985 0.003 260); color: oklch(0.15 0.015 260); font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.008 260); border-radius: 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.015 285); color: oklch(0.28 0.05 285); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.56 0.23 285); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. Transparent background, Cloud hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 20px; height: 40px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.15 0.015 260); font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.015 285); color: oklch(0.28 0.05 285); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.56 0.23 285); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard summary card with 3px indigo to emerald gradient top bar.
components.css: .ds-stat-card { position: relative; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 260); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08); padding: 24px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-stat-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.56 0.23 285), oklch(0.68 0.18 163)); } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.52 0.015 260); } .ds-stat-value { font-family: 'Fredoka', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 28px; color: oklch(0.15 0.015 260); margin-top: 4px; } .ds-stat-sub { font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: oklch(0.52 0.015 260); margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Plain Card
components.description: Standard content card. No gradient bar. Used for lists, forms, and content areas.
components.html:
Subscriptions
5 active services
$89.99 / month
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 260); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { padding: 24px 24px 0; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Fredoka', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; color: oklch(0.15 0.015 260); } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.52 0.015 260); margin-top: 4px; } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.15 0.015 260); font-size: 16px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Cloud-grey filled input with indigo ring on focus. Label always visible above.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.15 0.015 260); } .ds-input { height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; background: oklch(0.92 0.008 260); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 260); border-radius: 14px; font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.15 0.015 260); transition: all 150ms; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.56 0.23 285); border-color: transparent; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.62 0.015 260); }

components.name: Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Active sidebar navigation item. Gradient fill matches primary button.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.93 0.01 260); text-decoration: none; transition: all 150ms; background: transparent; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0.065 285 / 0.5); } .ds-nav-active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.56 0.23 285), oklch(0.55 0.22 305)); color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px oklch(0.56 0.23 285 / 0.20); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Avatar Initials
components.description: Deterministic colour initials avatar. Same service name always produces the same colour.
components.css: .ds-avatar { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Nunito', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Sack is built for the moment a person opens their laptop at the kitchen table and decides to actually understand their money. It is not a tool for financial anxiety — it is the opposite: a place where numbers feel manageable, even satisfying to look at. Deep indigo gives weight and structure, while Fredoka's rounded geometry and emerald moments of confirmation make the whole thing feel like something you want to open.

This is not a spreadsheet. It is not a fintech product. The Friendly Ledger metaphor names what the system actually is: a ledger — precise, honest, structured — but one that belongs to a person, not a corporation. The indigo primary is a commitment (Deep Conviction), the emerald accent is a reward signal, and everything in between is quiet white space that gives the numbers room to breathe.

The system explicitly rejects the visual language of crypto dashboards and spreadsheet clones: no dark neon, no gradient-heavy hero sections, no dense row-and-column layouts.
keyCharacteristics: Deep indigo primary anchors trust and structure across all surfaces
Rounded display type (Fredoka) brings personality without noise
Cards topped with a 3px indigo to emerald gradient bar on high-value surfaces only
12-24px radius scale — nothing sharp, nothing excessive
Press-scale buttons (active:scale-95) for tactile, kinaesthetic feedback
Near-white tinted background with intentional pure-white card surfaces
Sidebar lives in its own deep-indigo world, cleanly separated from content

rules.name: The Emerald Economy Rule
rules.body: Fresh Emerald appears in exactly two contexts: the right half of the gradient card-border accent bar, and success/confirmation states. It is not a background, a button colour, or a decorative tint anywhere else.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Deep Conviction Indigo and the sidebar's Deep Indigo are the same hue family (285°), different lightness. The system runs on one hue. No blue, no purple, no teal introduced as additional primaries.

rules.name: The Fredoka Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Fredoka is for h1-h6 only. Body copy, labels, and button text use Nunito. Mixing the display font into body-weight text makes the system feel like a children's product.

rules.name: The Weight Balance Rule
rules.body: Nunito 600 is the label weight. Nunito 400 is body. No 700 or 800 weight is in use.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only on cards (ambient grounding) and primary buttons (pressability signal). No surface gains a shadow from hover or elevation alone.

dos: Do use Deep Conviction Indigo for all primary CTAs, active navigation, chart series 1, and focus rings.
Do use Fresh Emerald exclusively for success states and the right half of the gradient card-border.
Do use Fredoka at 600 weight for all h1-h6; use Nunito for all labels, body, and button text.
Do keep card shadows diffuse and low-opacity (8% black light / 30% dark).
Do apply the gradient card-border to dashboard stat cards and high-priority summary surfaces only.
Do include both icon and text label on all navigation items.
Do add active:scale-95 to all clickable surfaces to maintain tactile consistency.
Do target WCAG AAA (7:1) for body text; WCAG AA (4.5:1) minimum for all other text.
Do include prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for all animations.
Do pair all colour-only status signals with a text label or icon.
donts: Don't use spreadsheet-style dense tables or row-heavy layouts.
Don't use crypto or fintech visual language: no dark neon, no rocket emojis, no growth-chart hero metrics.
Don't add more than one primary CTA per screen.
Don't apply shadows to surfaces beyond cards and primary buttons.
Don't use Fresh Emerald as a background tint, button colour, or general decorative accent.
Don't use red and green alone to convey financial status — always pair with icon or text.
Don't use border-left or border-right coloured stripes as card accents.
Don't use placeholder text as the only label for a form field.
Don't apply Fredoka to body copy, descriptions, or text below title-level.
Don't introduce a third colour family — Deep Conviction Indigo and Fresh Emerald are the two intentional chromatic voices.
